title: Verpine Ocular Enhancer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Verpine_Ocular_Enhancer.png|thumb|right|200px|[[Carth Onasi]] wearing a Verpine Ocular Enhancer]]
A '''Verpine Ocular Enhancer''' was a tool created and exported by the [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]]. This visor-shaped device mimicked the visual acuity of the Verpine. As such, the Verpine themselves had little use for this tool.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-07-XX -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
